title: Clothing Donation Programs * Pregnant Individuals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Clothing Donation Programs * Pregnant Individuals 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children Disaster/Emergency Issues Infants/Toddlers Men Pregnant Individuals Women Youth Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP EMBRACE GRACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a faith based support group that focuses on goal setting and planning. Participants can attend the annual infant and children's clothing swap and baby shower. Offers information on additional community resources. Accepts gently used maternity clothing and baby furniture and clothing. 1000 N Main Avenue Suite 12 Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Single and pregnant women Hours: Monday 6pm and Tuesday 5pm Email (971) 420-6801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP EMBRACE GRACE
